positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical celestial creature—a stylized, winged fox spirit—floating among constellations and glowing nebulae. The fox should be rendered with elegant, flowing lines and a sense of playful magic. Composition should be centered and vertically balanced, framed by crescent moons, tiny shooting stars, and abstract geometric celestial bodies. Style: Ink illustration meets modern vector art, highly detailed yet clean. Color Direction: Deep indigo, sapphire blue, and accented with brilliant gold and ethereal cyan glows. Use strong silhouettes and high contrast for print readability. Ideal for a central, impactful apparel print.
